title: EDEN trial
description: One completed (or in-flight) attempt to improve the experiment's objective. The metrics object's shape is constrained by the experiment's metrics_schema; this schema does not itself constrain metric key/value types, since those vary per experiment.

branch.description: Worker branch under work/*; present once the implementer starts.

commit_sha.description: Worker-branch tip; present once the implementer completes.

trial_commit_sha.description: Canonical-lineage SHA on trial/*; set only by the integrator.

metrics.description: Metrics payload; keys MUST be a subset of the experiment's declared metrics_schema and values MUST match the declared types (or be null).
